topic: GAP AUDIT for the spec-memory CLI workstream (001-spec-memory-cli) - find what is MISSING before implementation starts. The packet documents are the audit SUBJECT; the repository source is the evidence base. Audit inputs (read all): .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/027-xce-research-based-refinement/010-mcp-to-cli-tool-transition/001-spec-memory-cli/spec.md (workstream map), .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/027-xce-research-based-refinement/010-mcp-to-cli-tool-transition/001-spec-memory-cli/000-spec-memory-cli-research/research/research.md (sections 1-14: GO + zero unknowns, deltas D1-D7+DD-001), .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/027-xce-research-based-refinement/010-mcp-to-cli-tool-transition/001-spec-memory-cli/{001-cli-core,002-hardening-and-tests,003-runtime-integration}/{spec.md,plan.md,tasks.md}. Program context: .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/027-xce-research-based-refinement/010-mcp-to-cli-tool-transition/spec.md (program rules incl. the Runtime Pairing Requirement and 004+ deferrals). Workstream specifics: 37 tools; deltas D1-D7+DD-001; 10-13d estimate; phase-3 pairing includes a NEW OpenCode plugin (none exists today) plus CLI warm path in the spec-memory-serving hook adapters (claude session-prime/compact-inject/session-stop, codex session-start, devin session-start). The research measured ~40-46ms p95 warm node start and 134B default socket path (pinned to /tmp/mk-spec-memory). Five orthogonal audit lenses, ONE per iteration: LENS-1 COVERAGE CROSS-CHECK - reconcile the research parity matrix against the three implementation phase specs: is every tool, daemon service, and MCP affordance owned by exactly one phase requirement or task; enumerate anything unowned or double-owned. LENS-2 DELTA/REQUIREMENT TRACEABILITY - every research design delta (D-series) must map to a concrete phase REQ or task row, and every phase REQ must trace back to research evidence; list orphans in BOTH directions. LENS-3 RUNTIME PAIRING COMPLETENESS - compare the pairing scope (hooks for Claude Code/Codex/Devin + OpenCode plugin, warm-only) against the ACTUAL adapter/plugin/config inventory in the repo: does the phase-3 scope name every file that must change; are hook events covered per runtime; is the deliberate Gemini exclusion documented rather than accidental. LENS-4 SEQUENCING, DEPENDENCIES, AND CROSS-WORKSTREAM SHARED INFRA - validate the handoff chain and estimates arithmetically, then hunt cross-workstream risks the per-system research could not see: three CLIs sharing launcher-ipc-bridge patterns on one host (socket dir collisions, simultaneous multi-daemon auto-spawn, .opencode/bin naming, shared idle/reap policies, allowlist pattern collisions). LENS-5 ADVERSARIAL RESIDUAL SWEEP - contradictions between any two packet docs, hedged or unverified claims presented as settled, missing failure modes (both MCP and daemon down; CI/fresh-checkout cold start with no daemon; concurrent worktree sessions), and anything an implementer would trip over on day one. RULES: read-only outside your artifact dir; every finding carries file:line evidence; classify each finding P0 (blocks implementation), P1 (should fix before implementation), P2 (note). Do NOT report as gaps: MCP removal (program non-goal), reference migration (deferred 004+), Gemini hooks (deliberately excluded by operator - verify it is DOCUMENTED, which is in scope for LENS-3), checklist.md absence in planned-state phase packets (created at planning time). End with a verdict: COMPLETE (no P0/P1) or a numbered gap register. Write per-iteration findings and a final gap-register research.md in your artifact dir.
